title: Expert required for new monday set up. Tourism industry
excerpt:
Hi. 
We run a boutique accommodation business and have started to use Monday.com for CRM and workflow purposes. I’m looking for someone to help with software integrations and automations. Initial set up has begun but nee…

posts.author: HeatherCara (Heather Watkins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi.
We run a boutique accommodation business and have started to use Monday.com for CRM and workflow purposes. I’m looking for someone to help with software integrations and automations. Initial set up has begun but need help to complete.
We are located in NSW Australia so require someone who can work with us in AEST and be available to problem solve and ask questions of within our business hours

Needing set up to start -

  • integrations with; Gmail, MEWS, Active Campaign, Slack to start.
  • automated actions within Monday.com when certain events occur.

Looking forward to hearing from suitable experts. Pls email admin@carawirry.com.au with your availability and rates.

Thanks,
Heather
Carawirry Forest Escape

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
HeatherCara:

admin@carawirry.com.au

Hi @HeatherCara

upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialise in integrations and custom requirements.

Please feel free to return my email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to understand your use case and see how we can help you.

Meet with Peta

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @HeatherCara

Welcome to the community! You are in the right place to find someone! My name is Elena and I’m the founder of Kick Consulting. I worked with monday.com for over 4 years and have a team of 14 working along side of me (project/change managers, implementation specialists, developers).

Myself and some of my team are located in NSW as well :). We would love to help you finish the set up and automations.

We offer a complimentary 1-hour initial meeting to discuss your pinpoints, needs, possible steps forward and options. You can book a session through this link . If you are unable to find suitable time, please let me know and I will contact you with more availability.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Elena
Kick Consulting

posts.author: jennaioi (Jenna Mac Killop)
posts.cookedHtml: If you are still looking for a partner we would love to meet with you to discuss your needs around monday.com. We can accommodate working within your time zone. You can send an email to jenna@iointegration.com if you are interested in having an intro call with us sometime next week.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

Experts from our company can help set up monday dot com for your business.

We are one of the trusted monday.com partners actively supporting organizations to streamline projects, processes, and workflows, and harness the dynamic real-time team collaboration. We have a global staff network including dedicated teams. With a customized board developed by our monday experts for managing everyday work and projects, we boost your workflow optimization like never before. You’ll have access to our solutions engineers as well as our full-stack Development team who specialize in custom requirements and integrations.

Please feel free to reach us!
